nasb.text: The one who eats is not to regard with contempt the one who does not eat, and the one who does not eat is not to judge the one who eats, for God has accepted him.

esv.text: Let not the one who eats despise the one who abstains, and let not the one who abstains pass judgment on the one who eats, for God has welcomed him.

cnv.text: 吃的人不要輕看不吃的人，不吃的人也不要批評吃的人，因為　神已經接納他了。

ccb.text: 吃的人不可轻看不吃的人，不吃的人也不可批评吃的人，因为两者都蒙上帝接纳。

csbs.text: 吃的人不要藐视不吃的人，不吃的人也不要评断吃的人，因为神已经接纳他了。
